name: key-value
title: Key Value
description: Compound component for displaying labeled data. KeyValue wraps one or more KeyValue.Item rows in a semantic description list.

content.text: KeyValue.Item must be used within KeyValue
KeyValue.Item must be used within KeyValue

key-value-variants.raw:
import { KeyValue } from "@/components/ui/key-value" export default function KeyValueVariants() { return (
Horizontal (default)
Vertical Layout
) }

docs.description: Compound component for displaying labeled data. KeyValue wraps one or more KeyValue.Item rows in a semantic description list.

notes.title: When to use KeyValue vs Label
notes.content: Use KeyValue for structured multi-row data display (metadata panels, commit info). Use Label for form field labeling.

notes.title: Compound Usage
notes.content: Always wrap KeyValue.Item inside KeyValue — this produces a proper <dl> list. For a single pair: <KeyValue><KeyValue.Item label='...' value='...' /></KeyValue>.

notes.title: Color Variants
notes.content: 5 semantic color variants (default, warning, info, success, error) style the value text. The info variant uses monospace font instead of bold.

notes.title: Bordered Rows
notes.content: Set bordered on KeyValue.Item to add a bottom border, vertical padding, and compact text-xs sizing — ideal for stacked list layouts.

notes.title: Layout Options
notes.content: Horizontal layout (default) places label and value side-by-side. Vertical layout stacks them with a small gap. Both label and value accept ReactNode.
